arts.ttl: Ajax vs Union SG – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Ajax host Union SG in the second leg of their Europa League play-off tie this evening. The Eredivisie leaders boast a 2-0 lead from last week’s first leg and head into the clash in fine form. arts.ttl: Notable presence at Ajax: old acquaintance trains with the first team
arts.sum: Timothy Fosu-Mensah has trained with the Ajax first team in the run-up to the Europa League match against Union Saint-Gilloise.
